cookie_banner.message: We use cookies for the site to work, for analytics and (with your consent) for marketing. See our Cookie Policy for details.

privacy_v2.meta_description: Privacy policy for Servisna Knjižica: controller Green Line Trading LTD, data categories, legal bases, user rights and contact.
privacy_v2.s1_intro: The data controller and owner of the Servisna Knjižica project is:
privacy_v2.s1_li_address: Registered address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
privacy_v2.s1_li_registry: Company registration details: Green Line Trading LTD, UK company number 13072235. Public record: Companies House.
privacy_v2.s1_dpo_intro: A Data Protection Officer (DPO) has been appointed. Contact details:
privacy_v2.s2_body: This policy applies to the processing of personal data of users of the Servisna Knjižica web and mobile application, as well as visitors to the website.
privacy_v2.s3_intro: Depending on how you use the service, we may process the following categories of data:
privacy_v2.s3_cat1_text: first and last name, email, phone number (if used), password (hashed)
privacy_v2.s3_cat2_text: make/model, year, registration details (if entered), service events, reminders, invoices/files you upload
privacy_v2.s3_cat3_text: IP address, user agent, device type, OS, error logs, technical access logs
privacy_v2.s3_cat4_text: cookies/identifiers for analytics and advertising (only where valid consent is required and given)
privacy_v2.s3_cat5_text: we do not store full card details; payment processing is performed by an external payment processor (e.g. PayPal) as a separate controller/processor under its own terms
privacy_v2.s4_intro: We process data only where we have an appropriate legal basis:
privacy_v2.s4_p1_title: Performance of a contract / provision of the service
privacy_v2.s4_p1_b: maintaining the service record and application functionality
privacy_v2.s4_p2_a: system security, abuse prevention, fraud protection
privacy_v2.s4_p3_text: compliance with applicable laws and lawful requests from authorities
privacy_v2.s4_p4_a: analytics and marketing cookies/trackers (e.g. Google Analytics, Meta/Facebook Pixel) where consent is required
privacy_v2.s4_consent_note: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.
privacy_v2.s5_p1: We use necessary, functional, analytics and marketing cookies.
privacy_v2.s5_p2: Details (names, duration and purposes) are set out in the separate Cookie Policy.
privacy_v2.s5_li1: Necessary cookies: may not require consent where permitted by law.
privacy_v2.s5_li2: Analytics/marketing cookies: activated only after consent where required.
privacy_v2.s5_manage: You can change cookie settings at any time via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page (“Accept all” or “Essential only”) and through the Cookie Policy page on this site.
privacy_v2.s6_intro: We may share data with trusted partners only to the extent necessary to provide the service:
privacy_v2.s6_outro: We enter into appropriate data processing agreements with processors.
privacy_v2.s7_body: If data is transferred outside your country or outside the EEA/EU, we use appropriate safeguards (e.g. standard contractual clauses, adequacy decisions and/or other lawful mechanisms).
privacy_v2.s8_intro: We keep data for as long as needed for the purpose of processing and/or as required by law. Typical periods (example — adjust to real rules):
privacy_v2.s8_li1: account data: while the account is active; after account closure, retained for up to 90 days (unless the law requires longer) for backups and abuse prevention, then deleted or anonymised.
privacy_v2.s8_li2: service data: until deleted by the user or for up to 90 days after account closure, in line with retention rules.
privacy_v2.s8_li3: security logs: typically up to 12 months
privacy_v2.s8_li4: marketing data based on consent: until consent is withdrawn or the defined period expires
privacy_v2.s9_intro: We apply technical and organisational measures, including (where applicable):
privacy_v2.s10_li6: objection to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy_v2.s10_li7: withdrawal of consent (where consent is the basis)
privacy_v2.s10_complaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacy_v2.s11_body: The service is not intended for persons under 16 without parental/guardian consent where required by law.
privacy_v2.s12_body: We may update this policy from time to time. The updated version will be published on this page with a new “last updated” date. If changes are material, we will notify users in an appropriate way within the service.
privacy_v2.s13_intro: For questions about privacy and data processing:
privacy_v2.s13_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom

cookie_policy.meta_description: How Servisna Knjižica uses cookies and similar technologies; categories, third parties and consent. Controller: Green Line Trading LTD.
cookie_policy.intro_note: This policy explains which cookies and similar technologies we use in connection with Servisna Knjižica and how you can manage your choices. For details on personal data processing, see the Privacy Policy.
cookie_policy.owner_intro: The controller responsible for cookies in the context of this site and application is:
cookie_policy.owner_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
cookie_policy.what_body: Cookies are small text files that a site or application may store on your device. They are used for core functionality, remembering settings, statistics and (with consent) advertising.
cookie_policy.types_intro: Depending on their function, we use the following categories:
cookie_policy.type_essential_body: Required for basic operation, security and session (e.g. sign-in, CSRF, load balancing).
cookie_policy.type_functional_body: Improve user experience (e.g. language or interface preferences), where applicable.
cookie_policy.type_analytics_body: Help us understand how the service is used (e.g. Google Analytics). Activated after consent where required.
cookie_policy.type_marketing_body: Used to measure and display ads (e.g. Meta/Facebook Pixel). Activated after consent where required.
cookie_policy.third_party_body: We may use third-party tools that set their own cookies, in line with their policies:
cookie_policy.tp_fb: Meta/Facebook Pixel (advertising and measurement, where enabled)
cookie_policy.retention_body: Duration depends on the cookie type (session or persistent). You can see details in your browser settings or third-party tools.
cookie_policy.manage_body: You can change your choice at any time via the cookie banner on the site and/or your browser settings. More on data processing: Privacy Policy.
cookie_policy.changes_body: We may update the Cookie Policy; the updated version will be published on this page with a new date.
cookie_policy.contact_intro: For questions about cookies and privacy:
cookie_policy.contact_li_address: Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, United Kingdom
